hero.headline: STOP GUESSING. START SCALING.

ideology.title: The 5-Stage Revenue Journey
ideology.description: Most businesses are broken. They have pieces, but no engine. We fix the flow.

stages.title: Awareness
stages.desc: The Handshake. Logic: 'I have a problem.'

stages.title: Advocacy

testimonials.quote: Richard didn't just build a site; he fixed our entire sales process. The RJAT tool alone is worth the investment.

testimonials.quote: The definition of a force multiplier. Our operational efficiency doubled in 90 days.

about.title: The Architect
about.bio: I am Richard Norwood. I fuse Design, Logic, and Capital into a single Revenue Architecture. I don't work with everyone. I work with those ready to build an engine.
